subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from one servant unto another servant, that what hath been revealed therein may stir him and make him steadfast. Blessed be he who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من العبد الی عبد آخر لیهتزه ما نزل فیه و یجعله من الثابتین طوبی لمن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
